---
id: update-home-profile
title: "Creates customer home profile for values in request."
description: "Updates home profile information for a customer site."
sidebar_label: "Creates customer home profile for values in request."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Creates customer home profile for values in request."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/Customer/{customerId}/{customerSiteId}/homeprofile"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Updates home profile information for a customer site.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"customerId","in":"path","required":true,"description":"EnergyGrid Customer ID","schema":{"type":"integer"}},{"name":"customerSiteId","in":"path","required":true,"description":"EnergyGrid Customer Site ID","schema":{"type":"integer"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"hasCompletedProfile":{"type":"boolean","example":true},"metrics":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","example":"HomeType"},"value":{"type":"integer","example":1}}}}},"title":"UpdateHomeProfileRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Success. Home profile updated."},"400":{"description":"Bad request."},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized."},"404":{"description":"Not found."}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
